name: OSHA involved in my job ladder fall? Does it help claim?
description: Yes, OSHA violations = strong evidence for your claim.

mainEntity.name: OSHA involved in my job ladder fall? Does it help claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, OSHA violations = strong evidence for your claim.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**OSHA citation proves unsafe conditions**, bolstering comp/third-party case.[4]

Fines don't pay you, but evidence.

- Request OSHA file.
- Repeat violations strengthen.

Comp independent of OSHA.
